purpose: Consolidated security model for Global HR metadata-first platform covering Dataverse security roles, Power BI RLS, SharePoint permissions, API OAuth scopes, field security, masking, and audit controls.

summary.security_pattern: Zero-trust / least-privilege model using Entra ID OAuth2, Dataverse team security, field-level security, Power BI RLS, SharePoint groups, and no secrets stored in JSON.

security_principles: Least privilege: grant only the domains, tables, fields, and API scopes required by role.
Separation of duties: business owners approve access; HRIS implements; Data Governance audits.
No secrets in metadata: API keys, client secrets, and tokens must be stored in Azure Key Vault or platform-native secret stores.
Sensitive HR data requires field-level security, masking, RLS, and auditability.
External demo access must use anonymized, aggregated, non-sensitive content only.
Delete operations are restricted to HRIS Admin and Data Governance; soft delete or deactivate is preferred for HR data.

identity_and_authentication.human_user_auth: Delegated OAuth2 / SSO with MFA and Conditional Access
identity_and_authentication.service_to_service_auth: OAuth2 client credentials via Entra ID app registration

api_key_policy.api_keys_allowed_for_demo: Only non-secret mock keys for documentation examples; never grant real access.
api_key_policy.rotation_policy: Rotate secrets at least every 90 days or immediately after suspected exposure.

role_catalog.description: Read-only executive access to approved aggregated and governed HR data products.
Domain-level read/write access for owned HR data products and metadata review.
Controlled access to sensitive HR domains such as Compensation, Payroll, Succession, and Audit.
Cross-domain analytics access with masking for restricted person-level or compensation fields.
Administrative ownership for metadata, data quality, lineage, access reviews, and security model operations.
Technical administrator for Dataverse schema, API integrations, service accounts, and controlled data loads.
External-facing demo access to anonymized, aggregated, and non-sensitive SharePoint/Power BI artifacts only.

department_security_profiles.notes: External sharing must use anonymized demo content only.
Internal access only unless explicitly approved by Data Governance.
Internal access only unless explicitly approved by Data Governance.

power_bi_rls_policies.name: Country Region RLS
power_bi_rls_policies.purpose: Restrict users to assigned country or region.

power_bi_rls_policies.name: Department Domain RLS
power_bi_rls_policies.logic: User department must be authorized for the table domain or data product.
power_bi_rls_policies.purpose: Prevent cross-domain access such as Payroll vs L&D vs Recruiting.

power_bi_rls_policies.name: Manager Hierarchy RLS
power_bi_rls_policies.logic: User may view direct/indirect reports based on supervisory organization hierarchy.
power_bi_rls_policies.purpose: Support HRBP and manager reporting while limiting worker-level visibility.

power_bi_rls_policies.name: Sensitive Domain Suppression
power_bi_rls_policies.logic: Only explicitly assigned sensitive-domain roles may access record-level data; analytics users receive aggregate or masked outputs.
power_bi_rls_policies.purpose: Protect compensation, payroll, succession, and executive talent data.

dataverse_security_model.business_unit_strategy: Use business units or owner teams by HR domain and region when demo maturity requires row-level ownership.
dataverse_security_model.team_strategy: Create owner/access teams for HRIS Admin, HR Data Governance, each HR domain, and sensitive-data stewards.
recommended_role_layers: Environment Maker restricted to HRIS Admin

sharepoint_security_model.site_pattern: Global HR Demo Hub with libraries by domain and metadata-driven permissions.
sharepoint_security_model.external_sharing_policy: Disabled by default; allow only anonymized demo library content for approved external visitors.

api_security_model.auth_type: OAuth2 bearer token issued by Microsoft Entra ID

api_scopes.recommended_grant_type: OAuth2 client credentials for service-to-service; delegated auth for user-driven apps
api_scopes.secret_policy: No API keys or client secrets in catalog; store secrets in Azure Key Vault and rotate per policy.

api_security_model.credential_storage: Azure Key Vault / Managed Identity / Entra ID app registration; never JSON files.

access_review_frequency.external_demo_access: Before every demo campaign and monthly while active

implementation_checklist: Create Entra ID security groups aligned to role_catalog and department_security_profiles.
Create Dataverse security roles using domain_role_matrix and table_security_matrix.
Create field security profiles for PII, person identifiers, compensation/payroll, audit, and executive talent fields.
Implement Power BI RLS using department, country, region, supervisory organization, and sensitive-domain policies.
Configure SharePoint libraries and groups using classification metadata.
Register API scopes in Entra ID / API Management and map them to allowed departments.
Store all real secrets in Azure Key Vault; never in JSON, CSV, Power BI files, or SharePoint documents.
Run access review and test least-privilege scenarios by department before publishing dashboards or APIs.
